current plan uses no such filters."]},"attempt":2,"maxAttempts":4,"previousAttempt":{"sql":"WITH t AS (
  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships
  WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
), buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,
    t.min_amt AS min_amt,
    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t
  WHERE s.amount IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM buckets
GROUP BY amount_bucket, min_amt, max_amt
ORDER BY amount_bucket;","validationIssues":["All encoded fields (bucket_start, bucket_end, scholarship_count, amount_bucket) appear in metadata.columns — OK.","Empty bins are not shown: SQL groups only present buckets, so bins with zero counts (of the 20 intended bins) will be absent from the chart; this may make the distribution look sparser than a full 20-bin histogram.","X-axis title is "Scholarship amount (bucket start)" — consider labeling axis to indicate ranges (e.g., "Scholarship amount (bucket range)") or including units/currency if known, since the chart uses bucket_start and bucket_end as the bar extents.","metadata.rowCount is 7 (fewer than 20 bins defined in the query), indicating only 7 non-empty buckets in the sample — this is consistent with the SQL but worth noting for interpretation.","The SQL handles the edge case min_amt = max_amt by collapsing to a single bin; the visualization should still render a single bar in that case."]},"historySummary":"Attempt 1: passed","latest":{"sqlDraft":{"reasoning":"Computed 20 equal-width histogram bins across observed min..max amount using a CTE to get min/max, handle the min==max edge case, bucket each scholarship, then aggregate counts per bucket with deterministic ordering.","sql":"WITH t AS (
  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships
  WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
), buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,
    t.min_amt AS min_amt,
    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t
  WHERE s.amount IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM buckets
GROUP BY amount_bucket, min_amt, max_amt
ORDER BY amount_bucket;","assumptions":["public.scholarships.amount is numeric and not NULL for rows considered (we filter amount IS NOT NULL).","Histogram uses 20 equal-width bins spanning MIN(amount)..MAX(amount).","If MIN(amount) = MAX(amount), all records are placed in a single bucket (bucket 1) and bucket_start/bucket_end equal that value."]},"execution":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH t AS (
  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships
  WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
), buckets AS (

    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,

    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t

SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM buckets
GROUP BY amount_bucket, min_amt, max_amt

  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships

), buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,
    t.min_amt AS min_amt,
    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t
  WHERE s.amount IS NOT NULL

SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count

resultRaw.sql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships
  WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
), buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,
    t.min_amt AS min_amt,
    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t
  WHERE s.amount IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM buckets
GROUP BY amount_bucket, min_amt, max_amt
ORDER BY amount_bucket;

issues: All encoded fields (bucket_start, bucket_end, scholarship_count, amount_bucket) appear in metadata.columns — OK.

Empty bins are not shown: SQL groups only present buckets, so bins with zero counts (of the 20 intended bins) will be absent from the chart; this may make the distribution look sparser than a full 20-bin histogram.

X-axis title is "Scholarship amount (bucket start)" — consider labeling axis to indicate ranges (e.g., "Scholarship amount (bucket range)") or including units/currency if known, since the chart uses bucket_start and bucket_end as the bar extents.
metadata.rowCount is 7 (fewer than 20 bins defined in the query), indicating only 7 non-empty buckets in the sample — this is consistent with the SQL but worth noting for interpretation.
The SQL handles the edge case min_amt = max_amt by collapsing to a single bin; the visualization should still render a single bar in that case.

result.sql:
WITH t AS (
  SELECT MIN(amount) AS min_amt, MAX(amount) AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships
  WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
), buckets AS (
  SELECT
    CASE WHEN t.min_amt = t.max_amt THEN 1 ELSE width_bucket(s.amount, t.min_amt, t.max_amt, 20) END AS amount_bucket,
    t.min_amt AS min_amt,
    t.max_amt AS max_amt
  FROM public.scholarships s
  CROSS JOIN t
  WHERE s.amount IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  amount_bucket AS amount_bucket,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN min_amt ELSE min_amt + (amount_bucket - 1) * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN min_amt = max_amt THEN max_amt ELSE min_amt + amount_bucket * ((max_amt - min_amt) / 20) END AS bucket_end,
  COUNT(*) AS scholarship_count
FROM buckets
GROUP BY amount_bucket, min_amt, max_amt
ORDER BY amount_bucket;
